name: Carol Lawrence
abstract: Carol Lawrence (born Carolina Maria Laraia; September 5, 1932) is an American actress, appearing in musical theatre and on television. She is known for creating the role of Maria on Broadway in the musical West Side Story (1957), receiving a nomination for the Tony Award for Best Featured Actress in a Musical.

concerts.label: A Decade of Beauty: A Benefit for PETA (People for the Ethical Treatment of Animals)
Give My Regards to Broadway – A Salute to 125 Years of Musical Theater
